notes: This is a starter seed for the whiskey map MVP, not a finished master catalog.
MSRP values come from a public MSRP reference and should be treated as ballpark values, not live shelf prices.
Proof and age are only filled when verified during this research pass or directly implied by a legally defined label such as Bottled in Bond.
Company and distillery names are normalized enough for a first seed pass, but parent-company consolidation still needs a dedicated cleanup pass.
Expanded on 2026-04-17 by adding 83 additional bourbon records for broader browsing coverage.
Thumbnail URLs switched to direct internet image endpoints (picsum.photos) on 2026-04-17.
Switched away from random thumbnails: mapped verified bottle image URLs where available and left others to UI placeholder on 2026-04-17.
